resources.title: Equinix Metal
resources.evidence_quote: If you wanna try out Equinix metal, can use the code Rawkode live.

resources.title: EmojiVoto demo application
resources.evidence_quote: This is just a gRPC app that's got a couple microservices in it, and we'll be able to walk through how to go and diagnose an issue because we've actually got a bug in the application.

resources.title: Books app fault injection tutorial demo
resources.evidence_quote: But this is a different demo application that we'll need to install.

resources.title: Google SRE handbook
resources.evidence_quote: The Google SRA handbook says that a golden signal is kinda the most important thing to pay attention to.
